title: Nexus Plan State
description: Schema for .nexus/state/plan.json — the active plan produced by nx-plan and consumed by MCP tools

schema_version.description: nexus-core version that introduced this schema shape (e.g. '0.5'). Optional in v0.5.0 — candidate for required in v1.0.0 (Phase 2 entry).

topic.description: Human-readable topic or goal of this plan

issues.description: Ordered list of issues analyzed during planning

decision.description: The recorded decision; present when status is 'decided'

how_agents.description: Agent types consulted for this issue

how_summary.description: Key/value map of per-agent analysis summaries

how_agent_ids.description: Key/value map of agent type to agent instance ID

research_summary.description: Optional background research summary compiled during planning

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this plan was created
